ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If checked, the full Vault filepath is used for the label of grouped task items in the generated TODO file
ast.target: 如果勾选，生成的TODO文件中分组任务项的标签将使用完整的Vault文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If checked, task items in the generated TODO file are organized according to the folder structure of the Vault.
ast.target: 如果勾选，生成的TODO文件中的任务项将根据Vault的文件夹结构进行组织。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, any TODO file you create in a subfolder will be populated with task items from that folder and its subfolders.
ast.target: 启用后，在子文件夹中创建的任何TODO文件都将填充来自该文件夹及其子文件夹的任务项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, task items that appear in a nested TODO file are excluded from ancestor TODO files to avoid duplication.
ast.target: 启用后，出现在嵌套TODO文件中的任务项将被排除在祖先TODO文件之外，以避免重复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The filename to add to a folder to exclude all task lists in it from the generated TODO file. You may prefer to change the default value since dot files (files that start with a ".") do not show up within Obsidian.
ast.target: 要添加到文件夹中的文件名，用于将该文件夹中的所有任务列表从生成的 TODO 文件中排除。您可能希望更改默认值，因为点文件（以“.”开头的文件）在 Obsidian 中不会显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A pattern that should be inserted anywhere in a Markdown file to exclude it from the generated TODO file.
ast.target: 一个模式，可以插入到 Markdown 文件的任何位置，以将其从生成的 TODO 文件中排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A line matching this pattern marks the start of a region whose task items are excluded from the generated TODO file.
ast.target: 匹配此模式的行标记一个区域的开始，该区域的任务项将从生成的 TODO 文件中排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A line matching this pattern marks the end of an excluded region.
ast.target: 匹配此模式的行标记一个排除区域的结束。
